claim_policy: Every claim needs source/provenance or must be marked hypothesis/speculation.
source_policy: Preserve source, date, provenance, and uncertainty.
math_policy: Math claims require derivation, proof status, or conjecture status.
biology_policy: Biology claims require source, safety boundary, and no clinical/medical authority.
physics_policy: Physics claims require dimensional consistency and simulation/derivation status.
code_policy: Code claims require tests, lint/type status when applicable, and reproducible commands.
claim_boundary: Domain intelligence index is local development evidence only. It does not prove scientific truth, medical validity, physical law, mathematical proof, code correctness, safety, security, production readiness, model understanding, or autonomous authority.
